title: Plan versioning and prefer additive change
description: Choose a versioning scheme up front and evolve through additive, backward-compatible changes, reserving a new version for genuine breaks.
body: Use when changing an existing contract or launching a v1. Do not change a field's type or remove it within a published version. Actions: pick a scheme such as a URI major version or a header; make changes additive by adding optional fields and new resources; introduce a new major version only for unavoidable breaks and plan deprecation. Validation signals include existing clients continuing to work after an additive change. Risk boundary: a breaking change inside a live version silently breaks clients, so gate any non-additive change behind a version and a migration plan.
